chunks.text: She has a beautiful energy and non-judgemental attitude.    I am deeply grateful for the time we spent together which really allowed me to find myself and make progress towards my goals. - K. King (Reflexologist and Yoga Teacher)   Lisa Murphy Coaching,  Blanchardstown Therapy Centre, www. therapycentre. ie 3 Main St, Blanchardstown, Dublin 15, Co Dublin, D15 P261. lisamurphycoaching@gmail. com WhatsApp / Text: 083 065 5047 ​ Therapy Centre Page Link www. therapycentre.

Keenan (Teacher and Writer)   ​ I found that Lisa’s natural interest in a person's narrative and her own personal warmth combine to give a great feeling for the person on the other end.   She is really good at establishing trust and ease.  The Strategy Based Coaching sessions I did with her were far more insightful than I had even hoped they would be, they were amazing. - B. Higgins (Musician)   ​ I learned a lot about myself during my sessions with Lisa.

About Me More Info Services More Info FAQs More Info Testimonials I really enjoyed my coaching sessions and experience with Lisa.   She worked very strategically which was appropriate to my needs and I felt that she had great intuitive presence.   I would highly recommend her to everyone. - D.

I am very effective at this and in helping clients to move forward in the right direction, and I can do this for you.     To take action and speak with me, Call or Text (083) 0655047, or complete the Contact Form below.   Phone and Online Zoom sessions are available.   We can schedule a time to talk about your goals and needs and allow you to make progress towards meeting them.

I have helped many clients to clarify goals, overcome obstacles and take steps to achieve the outcomes they want to feel happier.      If this sounds interesting to you, I would love to hear from you.   Together we can discover what you really want from life and the easiest way to accomplish it.   I can answer any questions and share my unique insights and strategies for your situation.

Are you tired of feeling stuck, not knowing what to do next.   Wouldn’t it be nice if someone could help you with a step-by-step process to create the life you really want to live. ​ Hi, I’m Lisa and I'm really glad you are here, because I help people with exactly this – to discover how to make effective changes to feel happier and more fulfilled.   Once you have the right support and approach, this is so much easier to do.

Life Coaching takes place in a supportive and caring setting. Page title: Life Coach | Dublin | Lisa Murphy Coaching

## About
A qualified Life Coach, based in Blanchardstown Therapy Centre - Dublin 15, Lisa guides, supports and mentors clients on their personal journey to identify their goals and make that all important change in their personal life or career.
